summary: Phase 2 expansion testing completed successfully. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests passed: CommandBar (Cmd+K) works, Admin login works, Dashboard loads. New features tested: AI Script Generator (GPT-4o), Comment Sentiment Analysis, Ad Creative Library with top hooks and duplication alerts.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for screen readers (console warning only, not blocking)

passed_tests: POST /api/admin/login with correct credentials returns JWT token
GET /api/ads returns ad library data with ads array and format_stats (requires auth)
GET /api/ads/top-hooks returns ranked hooks by views (requires auth)
GET /api/ads/duplication-alerts returns products with high ad duplication (requires auth)
POST /api/ai/generate-scripts?product_id={id} generates scripts (requires auth) - GPT-4o via Emergent LLM
POST /api/ai/analyze-sentiment?product_id={id} returns sentiment scores (requires auth) - GPT-4o via Emergent LLM
Command bar component renders and opens with Ctrl+K
Dashboard loads with stats (Total Products, Explosive, Active Subscribers, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: CommandBar.jsx: Consider adding DialogTitle with VisuallyHidden wrapper for accessibility compliance (console warning present)
seed_data_creation: Ad creative library auto-seeds on first access via _ensure_ad_library()
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 adds AI tools (script generator, sentiment analysis) at /api/ai/* and Ad Library at /api/ads/*. All new endpoints require subscription auth (admin JWT works). AI endpoints use GPT-4o via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and may take 5-10 seconds. CommandBar opens with Ctrl+K or Cmd+K for global navigation. Ad library data is auto-seeded on first access. Previous iterations 1-6 features still working.
